title: The Airport Café
content: Marcus arrived at the airport much earlier than necessary, so he decided to spend some time at a café near his gate. He ordered coffee and a sandwich before finding a seat by the window. From there, he could watch airplanes arrive and depart throughout the morning. Around him, travelers discussed vacation plans and checked their boarding passes. The atmosphere felt busy but relaxed. Marcus enjoyed the opportunity to slow down before his journey began. When boarding was announced, he finished his drink and headed to the gate feeling ready to travel.
